description: Composition Brown georgette kurta with a mandarin collar and V-neck, has a printed chest panel with a bead, lace and sequin embellished yoke that has red piping, and puffed cap sleeves with red piping along the hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Wear your art on the go and flaunt your ethno-modern sense of style with ease by slipping into this kurti from aneri. The flowy georgette fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the embellished yoke heightens the fashion statement of this kurta. Team it with churidars, chunky accessories and leopard print sandals. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
